snapshot.description: Implement the Domain, Data, and Logic layers for the Lab Manager role. This includes managing pending orders, assigning specialists, and approving or rejecting final Karyotype results.
snapshot.title: Manager Data & Logic Layer Implementation

newValue.text: Implement `SpecialistRemoteDataSource` to fetch users with the `specialist` role.
Implement `ManagerDashboardCubit` to fetch and manage the list of pending/unassigned orders.
Implement `ManagerApprovalCubit` to handle the approve/reject state and logic.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Extend `TestOrderRepository` with `getAllPendingOrders`, `updateOrderStatus`, and `assignSpecialistToOrder`.
Implement `SpecialistRemoteDataSource` to fetch users with the `specialist` role.
Implement Usecases: `AssignOrderToSpecialist`, `ApproveKaryotypeResult`, `RejectKaryotypeResult`.
Implement `ManagerDashboardCubit` to fetch and manage the list of pending/unassigned orders.
Implement `ManagerApprovalCubit` to handle the approve/reject state and logic.

changes.newValue: Done: Extended TestOrderRemoteDataSource with getAllPendingOrders/updateOrderStatus/assignSpecialistToOrder. Created ManagerApprovalCubit + ManagerApprovalState. dart analyze: No issues found on all 12 target files.
